stack.build: none — plain HTML, inline CSS per file

url_patterns.guides: /<slug> (flat, top-level, clean URLs via Workers assets auto-trailing-slash)

ahrefs.domain_rating_note: DR 0 predates the July 7-8 2026 viral link wave (30+ new refdomains incl. DR 80-91 sites); expect a jump when Ahrefs recalculates. Re-check before big topic bets.
ahrefs.kd_cap_ladder: DR 0 -> KD <= 10; DR >= 10 -> KD <= 20; DR >= 20 -> KD <= 30. Re-check DR each session, bump accordingly (KeptWell's graduated ladder).

search_console.note: Neither verified yet as of 2026-07-08 — top pending manual step.
